---
title: "Customer Documents — Directory Tree"
subtitle: "Authoritative layout of `docs/customer-documents/`"
doc-type: index
audience: "Authoring leads · maintainers · canon-sync reviewers"
canon-source: "docs/governance/ARCHITECTURE.qmd §5.1"
derived-from: "Repo layout under docs/customer-documents/"
repo-path: "/docs/customer-documents/TREE.qmd"
---

# Customer Documents — Directory Tree {.unnumbered}

This page is the authoritative directory tree for `docs/customer-documents/`,
referenced from the [portal landing page](index.html) and from the
[customer documentation tree section](../governance/ARCHITECTURE.html#sec-customer-documentation-tree)
of the architecture spec.

The shape below is generated from the live repo state; the structural rules it
must conform to are fixed by `ARCHITECTURE.qmd §5.1` (top-level layout) and
`§5.2` (per-document leaf pattern).

## Top-level layout

```
docs/customer-documents/
├── index.qmd                          # Master Document (landing page)
├── TREE.qmd                           # this file — authoritative directory tree
├── ROADMAP.qmd                        # authoring backlog
├── document-index.qmd                 # cross-family document inventory
├── _metadata.yml                      # shared frontmatter defaults
│
├── orgpath-narrative/                 # 15-document reading sequence on the
│                                      #   governance substrate Microsoft did not build
├── executive-briefs/                  # single-page leadership summaries
├── executive-governance-series/       # 9-chapter book-length governance narrative
├── architecture-series/               # conceptual explainers for the UIAO model
├── modernization-specs/               # cross-adapter specs by domain
├── modernization/                     # AD-to-EntraID modernization program
├── adapter-specs/                     # per-adapter operational designs
├── validation-suites/
│   ├── adapters/                      # per-adapter validation suites
│   └── domains/                       # per-domain validation suites
├── compliance/                        # boundary, controls, mandates, IR
├── substrate/                         # core architecture + execution patterns
├── case-studies/                      # framing-pattern templates
├── whitepapers/                       # externally releasable long-form deep-dives
└── platform/                          # infrastructure runbooks (WS2025, IIS,
                                       #   Gitea, Intune, Azure Arc, OrgTree)
```

## Document-family breakdown

### `orgpath-narrative/` — 15-part reading sequence

Sequential explainer chapters (`00`–`14`) plus a family index, an interlude, an
audit-readiness deep-dive, and a chapter-19 acceleration appendix. Single
content folder; shared `images/` directory.

### `executive-governance-series/` — book-length narrative

Nine numbered chapters, each in its own folder with the standard
`<chapter>.qmd + IMAGE-PROMPTS.md + images/` triad:

```
executive-governance-series/
├── ch01-why-governance-fails/
├── ch02-compliance-paradox/
├── ch03-drift-as-primary-threat/
├── ch04-deterministic-governance/
├── ch05-adapter-model/
├── ch06-evidence-over-attestation/
├── ch07-operational-tempo/
├── ch08-governance-at-scale/
└── ch09-governance-operating-system/
```

### `modernization/` — AD-to-EntraID program

Cross-cutting modernization narrative split by program slice:

```
modernization/
├── access-plane/
├── client-server-to-hybrid-cloud/
├── directory-migration/
├── identity-orgtree/
├── network-transformation/
├── platform-substrate/
├── program-management/
├── target-surface/
├── transformation-engine/
├── uiao-modernization-program/
└── images/
```

### `compliance/` — authorization, controls, IR

```
compliance/
├── boundary-authorization/
├── controls-testing/
├── evidence-telemetry/
├── federal-mandates/
├── governance-canon/
├── incident-response/
└── policy-libraries/
```

### `substrate/` — substrate-level material

```
substrate/
├── core-architecture/
├── execution-patterns/
└── platform-tooling/
```

### `modernization-specs/` — cross-adapter domain specs

```
modernization-specs/
├── cloud/
├── identity/
├── sase/
├── sdwan/
├── telemetry/
└── zero-trust/
```

### `adapter-specs/` — per-adapter technical specifications

49 adapter folders, each containing the leaf triad
(`<adapter>.qmd`, `IMAGE-PROMPTS.md`, `images/`):

```
adapter-specs/
├── active-directory/                  ├── intune/                       ├── pki-ca/
├── azure-migrate/                     ├── irs-tin-attribute-service/    ├── purview-audit/
├── azure-policy-arc/                  ├── login-gov-federation-service/ ├── scuba/
├── bluecat-address-manager/           ├── m365/                          ├── scubagear/
├── ccm-bir/                           ├── mainframe/                     ├── service-now/
├── cyberark/                          ├── opm-azure-apim/                ├── siem/
├── dcsa-clearance-attribute-service/  ├── orgtree-drift-engine/          ├── ssa-attribute-service/
├── defender-for-cloud-apps/           ├── palo-alto/                     ├── state-dmv-realid-attribute-service/
├── defender-for-cloud-apps-actions/   ├── patch-state/                   ├── stig-compliance/
├── defender-for-endpoint/             ├── piv-usaccess/                  ├── terraform/
├── defender-for-servers/              ├── treasury-ofac-attribute-service/
├── dhs-everify-attribute-service/     ├── uiao-git-server/
├── entra-admin-units/                 ├── uscis-immigration-attribute-service/
├── entra-device-orgpath/              ├── va-veteran-attribute-service/
├── entra-dynamic-groups/              ├── vdr-bir/
├── entra-id/                          ├── vitals-attribute-service/
├── entra-id-governance/               └── vuln-scan/
├── entra-policy-targeting/
├── entra-workload-identity/
├── gsa-sam-attribute-service/
├── id-me-federation-service/
├── infoblox/
```

### `validation-suites/` — adapter + domain validation

Adapter validation suites mirror the `adapter-specs/` folder set (49 adapters).
Domain suites cover the six modernization-spec domains:

```
validation-suites/
├── adapters/        # 49 folders, one per adapter (mirrors adapter-specs/)
└── domains/
    ├── cloud/
    ├── identity/
    ├── sase/
    ├── sdwan/
    ├── telemetry/
    └── zero-trust/
```

### Smaller families

| Family | Shape |
|---|---|
| `architecture-series/` | 7 narrative `.qmd` files + shared `images/` |
| `executive-briefs/` | 7 brief `.qmd` files + shared `images/` |
| `case-studies/` | 6 framing-pattern `.qmd` files + shared `images/` |
| `whitepapers/` | 11 long-form `.qmd` files + shared `images/` |
| `platform/` | 3 runbook `.qmd` files + shared `media/` |

## Per-document leaf pattern

Every per-document folder follows the triad documented in
[`ARCHITECTURE.qmd §5.2`](../governance/ARCHITECTURE.html):

```
<document>/
├── <document>.qmd        # content with {{IMAGE:N}} placeholders + provenance frontmatter
├── IMAGE-PROMPTS.md      # prompts for this doc (schema §7.2)
└── images/
    ├── .gitkeep
    ├── image-01-<slug>.png       # NanoBanana raw output
    ├── image-01-<slug>.webp      # web-optimized
    └── image-01-<slug>.thumb.webp  # thumbnail for Front Door index
```

`IMAGE-PROMPTS.md` files are content-source, not site pages — they are not
rendered as standalone HTML.

## Conventions

- **Source format:** Quarto `.qmd` is the renderable surface. Quarto's render
  glob in [`docs/_quarto.yml`](../_quarto.yml) is `**/*.qmd`; plain `.md`
  files at this level (e.g. `IMAGE-PROMPTS.md`) are intentionally not
  rendered.
- **Frontmatter:** every `.qmd` carries the canon frontmatter set described in
  [`ARCHITECTURE.qmd §5.3`](../governance/ARCHITECTURE.html).
- **Images:** customer-doc diagrams go through the
  [Gemini Nano Banana pipeline](../../scripts/generate_images.py), driven by
  per-document `IMAGE-PROMPTS.md` files and the central
  [`image-registry.yaml`](../../diagrams/registry/diagram-registry.yaml).

## When this page is stale

Add or remove a top-level family, retire an adapter folder, or rename a chapter
folder, and this tree drifts from reality. Treat any mismatch between this page
and the live tree as a documentation bug — re-run the layout snapshot
(`Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory`) and update the relevant section above.
